creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
On Sat, Jan 12, 2013 at 01:22:54AM +0100, Jeremie Le Hen wrote:
> Do you have any idea if you can do it and, in case of a positive answer,
> when?

Right now the package building cluster is still down pending a security
review of the reworked codebase.  I hope that I am getting close to
being able to submit the reworked code for review.

-exp runs have been offline for more than 2 months, so there is a huge
backlog.

Sorry.

mcl
